channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 22nd April
item.description:
The tree is on Shelley road on the pavement. It is a small tree but growing at a slant towards the road.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road closure signs at junction and stating closed 27th April but the road is closed now., 22nd April
item.description:
Confusing signage due to tree works and vehicles are turning in the Vineries.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Information board identifying emergency contact company/number not displayed

item.title: Resurfacing work is taking place in Swindon Lane. This has involved relaying and raising drain covers as well as tarmacing. During these processes tarmac, today, has been laid to such a depth that it reaches the top of a kerb stone as shown in the photographs. There is therefore no gully at the edge of the road to take surface water. The gully is therefore blocked and it is inevitable that surface water will flow down the drive to this house causing a flooding issue. There is a minimal gap between the new road surface and the other kerb stones adjacent. While contractors are on site, it seems sensible for these issues to be dealt now., 22nd April
item.description:
Kerb outside of The Apiary, Swindon Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swindon Lane, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Some fix but not all holes have been repaired - makes no sense to not repair all. They still damage the car, 22nd April
item.description:
Mini roundabout with Holy Trinity church on left. this side of the road is worse than the right. Some fix has been carried out but not all holes have been repaired and it is still bumpy and lumpy going across this section of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post with the parking restrictions details was removed months ago and has not been replaced, leading to vehicles (including vans) parking for days at a time., 22nd April
item.description:
114 Hewlett Road. Also the double yellow lines between 114 and Jersey Avenue are significantly obscured or missing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 116, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 22nd April
item.description:
ENDW to install correct TM men ahead at work, footpath closed, footpath closed ahead signage
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: You tried to fix this yesterday but it is still very bad, very bumpy and will come apart in the next few weeks, please have a look at it yourself thanks, 22nd April
item.description:
Outside the side door of the greyhound pub
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way edge deteration approx 1000x800x50mm number 1 (CW6 Edge Deterioration)

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way edge deteration approx 14500x1000x40mm number 1 plus x5 NSD (CW6 Edge Deterioration)

item.title: Large, deep pothole on Hewlett rd outside no. 162. Urgent, dangerous just by a prep school., 22nd April
item.description:
Centre of the road outside 162 Hewlett rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 161, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous item left near brook, 22nd April
item.description:
There is what appears to be the remains of a moped/scooter/bike left near the brook which could cause harm to people and animals.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clyde Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please repair x1 chipped kerb stone 300x100x40mm with concrete fillet (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 28 day footway overriding approx 4000x1000x50mm tarmac parch stats required number 1 (FW Over-Riding)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 22nd April
item.description:
NWD Give and take PLEASE BRING X4 BARRIERS AND X 8 1SANDBAGS PLACE AROUND FOOTWAY OVERRIDING TO MAKE SAFE (FW Over-Riding)
Report on FixMyStreet
